name: condition-specific laser scanning speed
definition_or_note: parsed from the raw-data condition folder

name: free boundary
definition_or_note: outer envelope of the molten-region point cloud

name: front length
definition_or_note: forward melt-pool extent in the moving frame

name: rear length
definition_or_note: rear melt-pool extent in the moving frame

name: full width
definition_or_note: computed as 2 max(y) from the half-domain simulation

name: height span
definition_or_note: z_max - z_min of the molten-region point cloud

name: half-domain volume proxy
definition_or_note: convex-hull volume of the exported half domain

name: maximum temperature
definition_or_note: maximum molten-region temperature at a time step

name: mean temperature gradient
definition_or_note: point-cloud average at a time step

name: maximum velocity magnitude
definition_or_note: maximum molten-region speed at a time step

name: normalized heat input
definition_or_note: eta P/[rho c_p v r_b^2 (T_l - T0)]

name: reduced state vector
definition_or_note: [L_f, L_r, W, H, T_max, G_mean, U_max]

name: solid or unmelted domain
definition_or_note: appears only in the full physical problem; not exported in the present data

name: solid-liquid interface
definition_or_note: Stefan interface in the full physical problem

name: free surface
definition_or_note: liquid-gas boundary with heat-loss and Marangoni conditions

name: normal interface speed
definition_or_note: normal velocity of a phase boundary

name: Stefan-Boltzmann constant
definition_or_note: radiation constant in the free-surface heat-loss condition

name: surface gradient
definition_or_note: tangential gradient operator on the free surface

name: viscous stress tensor
definition_or_note: stress tensor used in the Marangoni boundary condition

name: molten-region observation operator
definition_or_note: maps the full physical solution to the exported molten point cloud

name: manifold projection operator
definition_or_note: projects the observed boundary onto the superellipsoid manifold

name: manifold projection error
definition_or_note: Hausdorff-type distance from observed boundary to fitted manifold

name: implicit boundary level-set function
definition_or_note: equals 1 on the fitted superellipsoid boundary

name: identified manifold parameter vector
definition_or_note: least-squares projection of the observed boundary onto the analytic manifold

name: boundary residual
definition_or_note: root-mean-square level-set residual on boundary-envelope points

name: relative volume error
definition_or_note: relative difference between analytic full-domain volume and mirrored convex-hull volume proxy

name: ridge regularization strength
definition_or_note: penalty coefficient used for coupled attractor identification

name: relative validation RMSE
definition_or_note: state-wise normalized validation error for the reduced dynamics

name: normalization floor
definition_or_note: small positive value preventing division by zero in relative error metrics

name: error-bound sensitivity weight
definition_or_note: nonnegative weight linking each diagnostic error source to total model error
